name: hanhwa_final
description: 루트에서 백엔드·프론트·AI·radar-service 개발 서버를 한 번에 실행

scripts.dev: node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs && concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,ai,radar -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node scripts/run-ai-server.mjs" "node scripts/run-radar-service.mjs"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
